offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, incomplete submissions cause delayed claim processing. We automate validation instead of manual review of claim submissions.
problem: Incomplete submissions lead to delayed claim processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Participate in community forums for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try manual submission review interface and dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
